'''kaluyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:docetaxel|docetaxel]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-l-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:docetaxel|docetaxel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kaluyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæliyith|kæliyith]] || [[word:kæliyij|kæliyij]] || [[word:kæliyish|kæliyish]] || [[word:kæliyi|kæliyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kaluluyuth|kaluluyuth]] || [[word:kaluluyuj|kaluluyuj]] || [[word:kaluluyush|kaluluyush]] || [[word:kaluluyu|kaluluyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kaluyuth|kaluyuth]] || [[word:kaluyuj|kaluyuj]] || [[word:kaluyush|kaluyush]] || [[word:kaluyu|kaluyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kalufyufth|kalufyufth]] || [[word:kalufyufj|kalufyufj]] || [[word:kalufyufsh|kalufyufsh]] || [[word:kalufyuf|kalufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kaluyuthu|kaluyuthu]] || [[word:kaluyuju|kaluyuju]] || [[word:kaluyushu|kaluyushu]] || [[word:kaluyuku|kaluyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kaluyuth|kaluyuth]] || [[word:kaluyuj|kaluyuj]] || [[word:kaluyush|kaluyush]] || [[word:kaluyu|kaluyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kaluyuthul|kaluyuthul]] || [[word:kaluyujul|kaluyujul]] || [[word:kaluyushul|kaluyushul]] || [[word:kaluyukul|kaluyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kaluyuuthuthu|kaluyuuthuthu]] || [[word:kaluyuujuju|kaluyuujuju]] || [[word:kaluyuushushu|kaluyuushushu]] || [[word:kaluyuuku|kaluyuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kaluyuthun|kaluyuthun]] || [[word:kaluyujun|kaluyujun]] || [[word:kaluyushun|kaluyushun]] || [[word:kaluyukun|kaluyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kaluyuthuoro|kaluyuthuoro]] || [[word:kaluyujuoro|kaluyujuoro]] || [[word:kaluyushuoro|kaluyushuoro]] || [[word:kaluyukuoro|kaluyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
